sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map_table (id INTEGER, value_map MAP<INTEGER, STRING>);
SELECT element_at(value_map, 100) FROM test_map_table WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_map_table SET value_map = map_remove(value_map, 100) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT element_at(value_map, 300) FROM test_map_table WHERE id = 1;
